heading: Boolean Values
body:
| Value | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ----- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| true  | Specifies that MongoDB Search must store all the fields in the documents. Storing full documents might significantly impact performance during indexing and querying. To learn more, see Storing Source Fields.This is not supported if index definition contains vector type field. Instead, use include to specify the fields to store on mongot or use exclude to exclude the vector type field from storage. |
| false | Specifies that MongoDB Search must not store the original source document. This is the default value for the storedSource option.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
